title: tephroseris subfloccosa
intro: Tephroseris subfloccosa, also known as woolly thistle or subfloccosa tephroseris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Tephroseris subfloccosa include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Tephroseris subfloccosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
